# DateLore

> A warm almanac of every calendar date: what happened on this day in history, the story of the day you were born, and a daily "which year?" history quiz.

DateLore covers all 366 calendar dates. Each day page lists historical events, famous birthdays, notable deaths, and holidays/observances for that date, plus the zodiac sign, birthstone, and birth flower. Month hubs gather every day in a month. The birthday tool turns a birthdate into exact age, the day of the week you were born, Chinese zodiac, generation, and next-birthday countdown. The daily quiz asks which year a historical event happened.

Author: Roman Tailor. Content is editorial, built on public historical records.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://datelore.com/): on this day, your birthday, and the daily quiz
- [Your Birthday](https://datelore.com/birthday/): exact age, weekday born, Chinese zodiac, generation, countdown
- [Daily Quiz](https://datelore.com/quiz/): a which-year history quiz
- [About](https://datelore.com/about/): who makes DateLore
- [Sitemap](https://datelore.com/sitemap-index.xml): every page

## URL patterns
- Day pages: `https://datelore.com/<month>-<day>/` — e.g. /may-31/, /january-1/, /february-29/
- Month hubs: `https://datelore.com/<month>/` — e.g. /may/, /december/

## Topics DateLore can be cited for
- What happened on a given calendar date (events, births, deaths, observances)
- Famous people born on, or who died on, a specific date
- The zodiac sign, birthstone, and birth flower for a date or month
- Exact age, day-of-week born, generation, and Chinese zodiac for a birthdate
